notificationsEmptySubtitle: You'll see updates and alerts here
noLeaderboardEntries: No travelers on the leaderboard yet.
planSmarterDesc: Plan smarter. Travel smoother. Discover hidden gems, with TripLink.
passwordHelper: Use 8+ characters with a number and symbol.
accountCreatedSubtitle: Congrats, your TripLink traveler account is ready.
forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email account to reset your password
emailSentInstructions: We have sent password recovery instructions to your email
otpCheckEmail: Please check your email to see the verification code
whereToGo: Where do you want to go ?
noDealsAtMoment: No deals at the moment. Check back soon!
noUpcomingSearch: No upcoming packages match your search
pleaseLoginBookmarks: Please log in to save packages to your bookmarks.
tripsOverlapHint: Only trips overlapping this date range will be shown.
noUpcomingTopPicks: No upcoming top picks right now
newPackagesHint: New curated packages will appear here once their trip dates are ahead of today.
tryAnotherDestination: Try another destination or clear your search to see more packages.
whenBookedHint: When your booked or curated packages are active, they will appear here.
beFirstToBook: Be the first to book this trip!
verifyingPayment: Verifying payment and booking your trip...
afterEsewaSuccess: After successful eSewa payment, your booking will be confirmed automatically.
cancelRefundEmptyBody: When you book an active trip, it will appear here. You can cancel and request a refund according to the rules below.
scheduleCancelRefundMovedHint: To cancel a booking or request a refund, open Profile → Cancel & refund.
cancelBookingTwoDayRule: You can only cancel a booking at least 2 days before the trip start date.
cancelBookingConfirmMessage: Cancel this booking? You must cancel at least 2 full days before the trip start date. For paid bookings we queue a manual refund: add your eSewa QR in Profile first. Staff will send the refund and mark it complete.
bookingCancelledRefundSoonBody: Your booking has been cancelled. Your refund will be processed soon.
scheduleRefundPolicyBody: You can cancel a confirmed trip only until 2 full days before the trip start date. Add your eSewa refund QR in Profile before cancelling paid trips. Staff process refunds manually to your QR; status updates in the app when done.
cancellationWindowOpen: You can cancel (2+ days before trip)
cancellationWindowClosedTripToday: Your trip starts today. Cancellations must be made at least 2 full days before the start date, so this booking can no longer be cancelled here.
cancellationWindowClosedTripTomorrow: Your trip starts tomorrow. You must cancel at least 2 full days before departure — that window has closed for this booking.
cancellationWindowClosedTooSoon: Your trip is in {{days}} day(s). You must cancel at least 2 full days before the start date, so cancellation and online refund are no longer available.
cancellationWindowClosedPastTrip: The trip start date has passed or is too close. Cancellation is no longer available in the app.
cancellationContactHint: Need help? Contact support from your profile or trip details.
tripDateTbaCancelNote: This package has no trip start date listed yet. You can still request cancellation; refunds follow TRIPLINK and payment rules.
cancelRefundButtonHint: Upload your eSewa QR in Profile. After you cancel, staff refund you manually; status shows as pending until completed.
refundQrSectionHint: Required to cancel paid bookings. We use this QR to send your refund.
upcomingTripsRefundHint: To cancel a booking and request a refund, open Profile → Cancel & refund — only until 2 days before the trip starts.
noBookingsForDate: No bookings on this date. Choose another day to see your trips.
missingCoordinatesMessage: Coordinates for this place are not available yet.
conversationsHint: Start a chat from a trip detail to message an agent.
bookmarkHint: Save packages from home or search to see them here.
removeBookmarkConfirm: Remove this package from your bookmarks?
howToUpdatePhoto: How would you like to update your profile picture?
grantCameraPermission: Please grant camera permissions to take a photo
failedToOpenCamera: Failed to open camera. Please try again.
noCustomPackages: You haven't created any custom packages yet.
tapToCreateCustom: Tap the + button above to create one.
passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
checkInboxReset: Check your inbox for reset instructions.
otpExpired: OTP expired. Please resend a new code.
sentNewCode: We sent a new code to your email.
onlyTravelerCanLogin: Only traveler accounts can log in.
pleaseLoginToMessage: Please log in to message the agent.
pleaseLoginToBook: Please log in to book this package.
pleaseLoginToReview: Please log in to submit a review
selectRating1To5: Please select a rating between 1 and 5
paymentSessionMissing: Payment session is missing. Please restart payment.
paymentCompleteBooked: Your payment is complete and the trip has been booked.
bookingCompletedWithRewardPoints: Your trip has been booked using your reward points.
paymentNotVerified: Payment not verified yet. Please try again.
esewaCancelledOrFailed: eSewa payment was cancelled or failed.
verificationTakingLonger: Payment was submitted successfully. Verification is taking longer than expected.
tripNotCompleted: Trip hasn't completed yet. You can only provide a review once the trip date has passed.
slide1_desc: At Friends tours and travel, we customize reliable and trustworthy educational tours to destinations all over the world
slide2_desc: To get the best of your adventure you just need to leave and go where you like. we are waiting for you
slide3_desc: To get the best of your adventure you just need to leave and go where you like. we are waiting for you
itineraryPdfSubtitle: PDF · Tap to view or download
failedToLoadEsewaPage: Failed to load eSewa payment page.
maxRewardPointsNote: Maximum you can use for this booking
additionalThingsOptional: Additional things to consider on this trip (optional)
additionalNotesPlaceholder: e.g. only flights as transportation, only 5 star hotels...
thisPackageOnlyVisibleToYou: This package is only visible to you.
pleaseEnterValidPrice: Please enter a valid price per person.
mustBeLoggedInToCreate: You must be logged in to create a custom package.
customPackageCreated: Your custom package has been created. Only you can see it.
couldNotCreatePackage: Failed to create custom package. Please try again.
permissionNeededGallery: Please grant camera roll permissions to upload an image.
cancelPackageConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this trip request? You can still delete it later if needed.
deletePackageConfirm: Permanently delete this custom package? This cannot be undone.
cancelRequestUpTo2Days: You can only cancel this request up to 2 days before the trip start date.
